How every team runs smarter with Lark
Built-in AI helps your team work seamlessly in one place, stay mobile, 
and move faster together.
Get your free demo
Global collaboration
Work across regions, time zones, and 100+ languages—powered by AI in one platform.
Unite your workforce

Capture meeting insights

Buy now

/ 200k workflow runs
AnyCross provides standardized system integration. Using drag-and-drop workflows, you can build large, complex integration flows without coding, enabling smooth data exchange between systems and streamlined business processes.
Buy now
Contact sales
Learn more
Trusted by fast-growing companies from 125+ countries
Frequently asked questions
Can I try Lark before purchasing?
Yes. You can download and sign up for Lark to experience the free Starter plan, which includes basic features like instant messaging, document editing, and video calling. If you want to explore Lark further or try advanced features,
contact our sales team
to schedule a demo.
What advantages does Lark have compared to other collaboration software?
Lark is a next-generation collaboration software that deeply integrates messaging, calendar, documents, email, video conferencing, approval management, and a no-code platform into one seamless workspace. Lark's efficiency and ease of use make it popular among employees, reducing the hassle of switching between multiple apps while significantly lowering costs. For product comparisons, visit
Why Lark
.
How can I purchase and pay for Lark?
If you want to purchase Lark Basic or Lark Pro, you can place an order directly on this page. Payments via credit card, debit card, or PayPal are supported, and you can request an invoice after payment.
For Lark Enterprise, the Frontline solution, or additional support,
contact our sales team
.
Can I subscribe to Lark on a monthly basis?
Yes. Lark offers flexible payment options. Currently, Lark Basic and Lark Pro support monthly subscriptions, and you can place an order directly on this page.
What currencies are supported for payment?
Payments are currently supported in USD, SGD, and JPY, depending on your country.
Can Lark integrate with other collaboration software I already use?
Yes. Lark offers direct integrations with Exchange, Outlook, Google Calendar, and Gmail. Additionally,
Lark AnyCross
,
Lark Developer
, and Base integrations provide reliable and efficient integration capabilities that let you quickly connect your existing systems with Lark through customizable workflows.
Is Lark Basic available in all countries and regions?
Lark Basic is available in many countries and regions worldwide. It is currently not supported in China, Hong Kong SAR, Macao SAR, Japan, and South Korea. For a complete list of supported regions, refer to this
Help Center article
. We are continuously working to expand our availability. If Lark Basic is not yet supported in your region, please contact our sales team to explore other available plans.
Pay less to get more today
No more redundant tools. Save time and costs.
Try for free
Get Lark today
Contact us
Download Lark
Users love us

Lark Help Center - Lark Tips and FAQs
Help Center
Getting Started
Using Lark
More Resources
AI Assistant
Log In
We’re here
to help you
Search our knowledge base
Getting Started
What is Lark
Welcome to Lark! Start your Lark journey here.
New Admins
Create a Lark organization and help your members get up and running.
New Users
Install and sign up to Lark, and learn the basics to get started today.
Using Lark
Account and Settings
Configure Lark settings, and create and join organizations.
Messenger
Connect with your contacts and essential apps in your chat feed.
Meetings
Instant translation, automatically generated minutes, and more.
Meeting Room
Manage your meeting rooms and how they're used.
Docs
Collaborate in real time, with secure permission controls.
Base
Automate tasks, analyze data, and manage projects.
Email
Sync across devices, read offline, send to chats, and much more.
Calendar
Manage your availability with both internal and external contacts.
Approval
Simplify processes and communicate with the right stakeholders.
Attendance
Multiple capabilities to manage attendance easily.
Workplace
Quick access to all the essential tools.
Admin Console
Configure Lark settings to meet your organization's needs.

analysis.name: Lark
analysis.tagline: AI-powered superapp for high-growth, agile, connected, global, innovative, inclusive teams
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one AI-powered collaboration platform replacing chat, docs, meetings, and workflows with a single subscription.
analysis.ideal_customer: High-growth global companies with distributed or frontline workforces needing to consolidate multiple SaaS tools

features.name: team messenger
features.description: Fast, reliable team chat with group chats up to 500 members and supergroups up to 5,000+
features.evidence_quote: Group chat size: 20 (Starter), 500 (Basic/Pro), Supergroups with 5,000 or more (Enterprise)

features.name: message history
features.description: Permanent message storage on paid tiers; 18-month limit on free tier

features.name: real-time message translation
features.description: Inline message translation supporting 100+ languages across all plans

features.name: video meetings
features.description: Secure HD video calls; 1-on-1 on free/basic, up to 500 participants on Pro/Enterprise

features.name: meeting recording
features.description: HD video conferencing recording with minute allotments by plan
features.evidence_quote: HD video conferencing usage: 5 million minutes per year (Pro), 10 million minutes/year + 2,000/user (Enterprise)

features.name: webinar
features.description: Host webinars for up to 500 participants

features.name: breakout rooms
features.description: Split meeting participants into smaller breakout sessions

features.name: in-meeting voting
features.description: Run polls and votes directly within a live meeting

features.name: meeting lobby
features.description: Hold participants in a lobby before admitting them to meetings

features.name: language interpretation
features.description: Live interpretation channels within meetings for multilingual audiences

features.name: real-time multilingual subtitles
features.description: Auto-generated live captions translated into multiple languages during meetings

features.name: meeting transcription (lark minutes)
features.description: Automatic full transcription of meetings via Lark Minutes product

features.name: ai meeting notes
features.description: AI-generated real-time summaries, notes, and action items synced to Docs and Tasks
features.evidence_quote: Get real-time summaries, automatically generated notes, and accurate action item tracking

features.name: meeting room reservation
features.description: Manage and reserve physical meeting rooms with administrator controls

features.name: collaborative docs
features.description: Real-time collaborative document editing with secure permission controls
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate in real time, with secure permission controls.

features.name: slides
features.description: Presentation creation and editing tool within the Lark platform

features.name: wiki
features.description: Centralized team knowledge base for organizing and sharing information

features.name: base (no-code database)
features.description: No-code business management tool for data management, workflows, and dashboards
features.evidence_quote: Base is a powerful, intuitive business management tool... streamline daily tasks and workflows without any coding

features.name: base ai
features.description: AI capabilities within Base for data analysis and automation; trial on all paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Expanded trial of Base AI (Pro/Enterprise), Limited trial of Base AI (Starter)

features.name: base advanced permissions
features.description: Granular permission controls for Base databases, available on Pro and Enterprise

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: No-code automation engine to trigger actions, alerts, and content generation

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Structured approval processes to automate and track decisions with stakeholders

features.name: email
features.description: Built-in team email client with offline reading, device sync, and send-to-chat
features.evidence_quote: Sync across devices, read offline, send to chats, and much more.

features.name: calendar
features.description: Team calendar for scheduling and availability management with internal and external contacts
features.evidence_quote: Manage your availability with both internal and external contacts.

features.name: forms
features.description: Form builder for collecting structured data from teams or external respondents

features.name: okr
features.description: OKR (Objectives and Key Results) tracking tool included in every plan

features.name: attendance management
features.description: Multiple capabilities to manage employee attendance including remote team support
features.evidence_quote: Multiple capabilities to manage attendance easily.

features.name: meegle (project management)
features.description: Professional project management platform for complex projects with standardized workflows
features.evidence_quote: Meegle is a professional project management platform designed for complex projects.

features.name: anycross (system integration)
features.description: Drag-and-drop no-code integration builder for connecting external systems with data exchange
features.evidence_quote: AnyCross provides standardized system integration... build large, complex integration flows without coding

features.name: anygen ai teammate
features.description: All-in-one AI assistant embedded in the Lark workspace for productivity tasks
features.evidence_quote: AnyGen AI Teammate: The all-in-one AI teammate for your Lark workspace

features.name: lark developer platform
features.description: Open API and developer tools for building custom integrations and solutions on Lark
features.evidence_quote: Lark Developer: Create custom solutions with APIs

features.name: workplace app launcher
features.description: Centralized hub for quick access to all Lark tools and third-party apps
features.evidence_quote: Workplace: Quick access to all the essential tools.

features.name: sso (single sign-on)
features.description: Single sign-on for enterprise authentication and identity management

features.name: advanced security and compliance controls
features.description: Enterprise-grade security controls beyond standard encryption and admin settings

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: Data encrypted in transit and at rest with regular security audits on AWS
features.evidence_quote: Encryption, regular audits, and secure cloud hosting on AWS.

features.name: admin console
features.description: Admin configuration panel for organization-wide Lark settings and controls
features.evidence_quote: Admin Console: Configure Lark settings to meet your organization's needs.

features.name: granular admin controls
features.description: Detailed per-user and per-group permission controls for data privacy
features.evidence_quote: Granular admin controls safeguard user data at every level.

features.name: frontline operations support
features.description: Mobile-first tools for frontline staff including automated updates and HQ feedback loops
features.evidence_quote: Keep frontline teams connected and acting fast with automatic updates and feedback from HQ.

features.name: communication and collaboration permissions
features.description: Role-based permissions governing who can communicate and collaborate with whom

features.name: supergroups
features.description: Large group chats supporting 5,000 or more participants for enterprise-wide broadcasts

features.name: mobile dashboard charts interaction
features.description: Interact with Base dashboard charts directly on the mobile app
features.evidence_quote: V7.64 Interact with dashboard charts on the mobile app!

features.name: custom base record detail pages
features.description: Customizable layout for individual record detail pages in Base databases
features.evidence_quote: V7.62 Reset layout for custom Base record details pages in one click

features.name: savings calculator
features.description: Interactive tool to estimate cost savings from consolidating tools into Lark
features.evidence_quote: With 1000 employees, your company could save at least $390,000 per year by using Lark.

integrations: AnyCross (native no-code integration builder for external systems)
Lark Developer API (open platform for custom integrations)
differentiators: All-in-one superapp replacing 4+ separate business tools in one subscription
100+ language real-time translation built into every plan including free
AI-powered workflows natively embedded across chat, meetings, docs, and Base
Frontline operations support with mobile-first design for non-desk workers
Global reach: 125+ countries, 40+ country unified workspaces
No-code automation and database (Base) included in core platform at no extra charge
OKR tracking included in every plan including free
10x operational efficiency and 70% cost savings claimed vs. multi-tool stacks

recent_ships.what: Mobile dashboard chart interaction in Base
recent_ships.source: V7.64 Interact with dashboard charts on the mobile app!

recent_ships.what: AHA PC Doctor in-app troubleshooting tool
recent_ships.source: V7.63 AHA PC Doctor is now available to help you resolve common issues easily!

recent_ships.what: One-click reset layout for custom Base record detail pages
recent_ships.source: V7.62 Reset layout for custom Base record details pages in one click

praised: 4.9 App Store rating based on 2,300+ reviews (App Store)
Recognized by G2 and trusted by 2,000+ global leaders (landing page claim)

free_tier.limits: 20 users max, 100 GB storage, 1-on-1 video only, 18-month message history, 1,000 automations/month, 2,000 rows/table

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 20 users, 100 GB storage, 1-on-1 video, 18-month history, 1K automations/mo, 250 MB file upload

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 users, 5 TB storage, 1-on-1 video, unlimited history, 1K automations/mo, 250 MB file upload

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 users, 15 TB storage, 500-participant video, 50K automations/mo, 20K rows/table, 50 GB file upload, Base advanced permissions

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited users, 15 TB + 30 GB/user storage, 500K automations/mo, 50K rows/table, SSO, advanced compliance, 100 GB file upload

pricing.notes: Yearly billing saves ~16.6% vs monthly. Add-ons sold separately: AI Meeting Notes ($1,699/1,800 notes), Meegle Premium ($12/user/mo), Base automation expansion ($599/50K runs), AnyCross workflow expansion ($1,000/200K runs). Storage on Basic and above is listed as expandable. Video conferencing minutes are pooled annually with expansion available. Base AI is in 'trial' mode on all tiers — full Base AI availability not clarified. Pro plan requires 'Contact sales' for some configurations per pricing page.
